summary: Completed testing of Content Strategy & SEO Copywriting features (Iteration 5). All 13 backend tests passed. Frontend UI tests verified: Content Strategy tab in Configuration page works with all fields (funnel stage, copywriting model, buyer persona, psychological levers, CTA, keywords, notes), Generator page shows content type selector and strategy summary with expandable brief editor, config merge preserves keyword_combinations when saving content_strategy.

minor.issue: Returns 400 'API Key LLM non configurata' when LLM config is null - expected behavior but test client lacks LLM config

passed_tests: Backend: Content strategy exists in client configuration

Backend: Content strategy has all 13 required fields (funnel_stage, obiettivo_primario, modello_copywriting, buyer_persona_nome, buyer_persona_descrizione, buyer_persona_obiezioni, cta_finale, search_intent, leve_psicologiche, keyword_secondarie, keyword_lsi, lunghezza_target, note_speciali)
Backend: Content strategy values are valid (funnel in TOFU/MOFU/BOFU, model in AIDA/PAS/FAB/PASTOR/Libero)
Backend: Config merge - combinations preserved after content_strategy save (8 combinations)
Backend: All config sections preserved after content_strategy update
Backend: PUT /configuration merges content_strategy without deleting keyword_combinations
Backend: POST /api/articles/generate-and-publish accepts content_type field (model validation passes)
Backend: POST /api/articles/generate-and-publish accepts brief_override field (model validation passes)
Backend: GET /api/clients/{id}/combinations returns 8 combinations
Backend: GET /api/activity-logs/{client_id} works (22 entries)
Frontend: Login with admin@seoengine.it works
Frontend: Configuration page loads with 7 tabs (API Keys, Knowledge Base, Tono & Stile, Keywords, Strategia, SERP, Prompt Avanzato)
Frontend: Strategia tab shows Strategia Funnel section with funnel_stage select (MOFU)
Frontend: Strategia tab shows Modello Copywriting section with model select (PAS)
Frontend: Strategia tab shows Buyer Persona section with name/description/objections fields
Frontend: Strategia tab shows 7 Leve Psicologiche buttons
Frontend: Strategia tab shows CTA Finale textarea and Lunghezza Target input
Frontend: Generator page loads at /clients/{clientId}/generate
Frontend: Generator shows Content Type selector (Articolo Blog default)
Frontend: Generator shows strategy summary (Funnel=MOFU, Modello Copy=PAS)
Frontend: Generator has expandable 'Brief personalizzato' with CTA and Notes inputs
Frontend: Generator shows 8 combinations with checkboxes
Frontend: Generator has WordPress publish toggle
Frontend: Generator has Activity Log panel with real-time updates
Frontend: Activity Log page shows 22 operations, 11 successes, 3 WP published
critical_code_review_comments: GeneratorPage.jsx has React hooks exhaustive-deps warnings (useEffect missing getAuthHeaders and fetchLogs dependencies) - non-blocking but should be fixed
seed_data_creation: Content strategy was already configured for test client with funnel=MOFU, modello=PAS
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Content Strategy features working: 1) ContentStrategyTab.jsx renders in Configuration page with all fields (funnel_stage, modello_copywriting, buyer_persona, leve_psicologiche, keyword_secondarie, keyword_lsi, cta_finale, note_speciali), 2) PUT /api/clients/{id}/configuration correctly merges content_strategy without overwriting keyword_combinations, 3) POST /api/articles/generate-and-publish model accepts content_type and brief_override fields, 4) Generator page shows content type selector, strategy summary from client config, and expandable brief editor. LLM config is null for test client so actual generation cannot be tested.

config_merge.behavior: PUT /configuration merges with existing config, preserves keyword_combinations
config_merge.tested: Updated content_strategy, verified 8 combinations still exist

generator_page.content_type_selector: Shows Articolo Blog / Pillar Page / Landing Page options
generator_page.strategy_summary: Displays Funnel and Modello Copy from client config
generator_page.brief_editor: Expandable section with CTA and Notes inputs for per-generation overrides
